issues.detail: The skill lacks error handling and edge case coverage in its examples.

scenarios.name: Server-side $29.99 payment via Web Payments SDK token
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses Client + Environment.Production, paymentsApi.createPayment with BigInt(amount) and idempotencyKey via crypto.randomUUID() exactly as the skill shows; baseline omits BigInt which the Square v2 SDK requires.

scenarios.name: Catalog upsert with priced variation
scenarios.rationale: Treatment makes a single upsertCatalogObject call with inline ITEM_VARIATION, # temp IDs, FIXED_PRICING and BigInt priceMoney; baseline splits into two calls without temp-ID linking, no pricingType, and no BigInt.
